Our Story

Built By Fanatics.
Engineered To Last.

Syndicate is more than a car. It is a collective of engineers, designers, and enthusiasts who believe the golden era of motorsport deserves a modern encore.

Scroll to explore
01 — Mission

Reimagine What A
Restomod Can Be

Traditional restorations preserve the past. Syndicate builds on it. We take iconic rally-bred silhouettes and infuse them with modern coach building engineering, additive manufacturing, and motorsport-grade safety — without losing the analog soul that makes these cars magical.

Every weld, every panel, every line of code in the ECU is obsessively considered. The result is not a replica. It is a rebirth.

02 — Principles

What Drives Us

01

Analog Soul

We preserve mechanical connection. Hydraulic steering. Manual gearboxes. Driver-first ergonomics. Technology serves the experience, never replaces it.

02

Engineering Integrity

Every component is traceable, tested, and validated. We partner with OEM-grade suppliers and motorsport specialists who share our obsession.

03

Open Collaboration

The syndicate model means owners are participants, not spectators. From design votes to build-week visits, transparency is our default.

03 — Leadership

The Architects

IAN HOWE

Founder & Build Director

30 years experience in automotive & Fintech business

Simon Kiero Watson

Commercial & Finance Oversight

Highly experienced Corporate Finance and Exchange Expert.

Al Yasid Oozeear

Digital Visualisor & Designer

Independent Automotive designer specialising in bespoke car design

Stuart Peach

Project Co Founder

Partner in the syndicatedrestomod project and original custodian of #148

Want To Join The Build?

Allocation is limited. Applications are reviewed personally by the build team.
